mapper.sql: SELECT IMAGE_NO , IMAGE_WRITER , IMAGE_TITLE , IMAGE_CONTENT , COUNT , CREATE_DATE , IMAGE_EXIST FROM IMAGE
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM IMAGE WHERE STATUS = 'Y'
WHERE STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY IMAGE_NO DESC
SELECT ATTACHMENT_NO , REF_INO , ORIGIN_NAME , CHANGE_NAME , FILE_PATH , FILE_LEVEL FROM IMAGE_ATTACHMENT WHERE REF_INO = #{refIno} AND FILE_LEVEL = 'M'
